name: Kurban Bayramı (Istanbul)
traditions: Ritual sacrifice; meat distribution to neighbors and poor; family visits; special mosque prayers; Turkish delight and baklava.
historicalBackground: Istanbul's observance blends Ottoman-era traditions with the universal Islamic celebration, centered on historic mosques like the Blue Mosque and Süleymaniye.
description: Istanbul's observance of the Feast of Sacrifice, blending Ottoman grandeur with Islamic devotion at the city's magnificent mosques.
